positive: A dynamic, stylized illustration of a roaring, joyful celestial lion head silhouetted against a cosmic gradient of deep indigo, sapphire blue, and electric violet. The lion's mane should explode with geometric, crystalline starburst elements and flowing nebula trails. Incorporate subtle gold foil accents outlining the features, giving it a luxurious, mystical feel. The composition must be perfectly centered, designed to wrap around apparel, with strong negative space in the background to emphasize the silhouette. High contrast, clean linework, vector art style, minimalist yet maximalist complexity, perfect for screen printing.
